creator: nrgmilk@gmail.com
text:
It came to reboot around in the change of CPU from Athlon64 3700 + to
Opteron185 suddenly. About four months ago.

It publishes together because the dump was output this time though neither
the log nor the dump were usually output. 

This phenomenon has happened since 6.2.
